changeSet.author: wpoteat
changeSet.comment: Add index to tally snapshots for lookup of primary rows only. This should only run in developer setups. The index will be applied alternately in stage and production environments.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX tally_snapshot_is_primary ON tally_snapshots ( org_id, product_id, granularity, sla, usage, billing_provider, billing_account_id, snapshot_date) WHERE is_primary = TRUE;
